    Circular Shadows and Slices in p-norm Balls

    ← Gallery Open in Desmos ↗
    Dual Norm Balls

    (Only \(p\) is interactive, \(q =\tfrac{p}{p-1}\) automatically)

    \(p\) = 1.33
    \(q\) = 4.00
    Rotation Parameters
    \(a\) = -0.26
    \(b\) = -0.62
    \(c\) = 0.79
    Hyperplane Parameters
    \(a_1\) = 0.78
    \(b_1\) = 2.02
    \(c_1\) = 1.00
